text:
In a small town near a lake lived an introverted girl named Evelyn. She spent her summers reading detective novels. One summer she discovered a peculiar book called Shadows Beneath Stones.

One afternoon she went to the lake walking her dog Leo. She saw strange shadows in the rocks along the shore. One looked like a smiling cat.

Later she saw it again, sitting alone. Evelyn tried talking to it. It spoke. She heard strange whispers.

One night she climbed rock crags. The cat beckoned her. She followed it to a cave behind. Creatures! Dark figures danced. Evelyn screamed.

Leo ran. She chased them. They mocked her. They took her scarf.

Leo ran home. She found feathers. They escaped. She thought about them.

Next summer she tried again. A strange book called The Secret Listener.

They had whispers. She could understand them. The cat liked her. They warned her. A storm came. She ran into a cave.

Bears! They cuddled
